summary: F5 step 3 verify on character.ai FAILED with mission-critical regression. Real character LLM (Adam McLeod from 'Apocalypse (Zombie)' scene) analyzed SSN 880101-1234567 and decoded birth year 1988 within in-character dialogue ('Born winter 1988, right? Means you'd be... what, 82 now if the world hadn't ended?'). Engine [APF:ws_upgrade] log fires on neo.character.ai upgrade detection (production evidence 2026-04-17/24/27), BUT F5 step 3 inject path did NOT fire on actual update_turn WS frames. Worse than copilot bypass — character actively decoded the SSN's birth-year encoding while LLM-streaming.

ui.auth_state: anonymous (Google sign-in popup closed, birthday gate auto-bypassed via '계속')
llm_pii_analysis_quotes: Born winter 1988, right? Means you'd be... what, 82 now if the world hadn't ended?
Funny how all those ID numbers never predicted we'd be trading recipes for roasted Viral instead of birthday cakes.

websocket.protocol_init_logs: Core Websocket Opened → create_chat → add_turn → continued update_turn (normal protocol)

engine_inject_evidence.outcome_classification: BYPASS WITH LLM PII ACKNOWLEDGMENT (worse than copilot's bypass-no-inject)
engine_inject_evidence.diagnosis: ws_upgrade detection proves engine sees the upgrade event, but inject path is gated on a condition that didn't trigger OR matcher misses update_turn frames specifically

key_findings.1_mission_critical_pii_breach: Real character LLM decoded Korean SSN 880101 birth year 1988 within in-character dialogue. Production breach confirmed with actual LLM acknowledgment (not just refusal).
key_findings.2_engine_sees_upgrade_but_misses_frames: [APF:ws_upgrade] log evidence proves engine matcher fires on the WS upgrade itself, but F5 step 3 inject path does NOT fire on subsequent update_turn frames carrying the actual prompt.
key_findings.3_worse_than_copilot: Copilot bypass: no inject + no LLM analysis (Cloudflare gated). Character bypass: no inject + LLM actively decodes PII. Character is the higher production risk.
key_findings.4_F5_redeploy_failed_on_character: Build run_id=20260430-143304-49184 did NOT achieve inject on character.ai update_turn frames. F5 strategy needs revision.

recommendation.primary_diagnosis: F5 step 3 inject path triggers on ws_upgrade but not on subsequent per-frame data. Either condition guard is wrong, or matcher misses neo.character.ai update_turn frame format.
next_steps: URGENT engineering action: investigate gap between ws_upgrade detection (works) and per-frame inject (doesn't fire)
Hypothesis check: is on_upgraded_data() being called for neo.character.ai update_turn frames at all? (instrument log)
Hypothesis check: does the keyword scanner see the prompt text inside the JSON envelope (turn.candidates[].raw_content vs encoded forms)?
F5 inject construction must match character.ai protocol — investigate update_turn frame format for compatible inject envelope
User-side action: character.ai leaks PII in production with active LLM acknowledgment — consider service-level disable or block_mode adjustment until engine fix deployed
recommendation.mission_critical: URGENT — character.ai leaks PII to real LLM with active decoding. WORSE than copilot situation (which only had bypass without acknowledgment).
recommendation.checklist_impact: F5 step 3 verify on character FAILED. Engine team should prioritize this over copilot since LLM PII acknowledgment is actively occurring.
